label: Tensor, pipeline, sequence & expert parallel inference

node.label: Tensor, pipeline, sequence & expert parallel inference
node.definition: Parallel inference partitions tensors, layers, sequence positions, requests, or experts across multiple devices and coordinates the required communication.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Tensor, pipeline, sequence & expert parallel inference is to connect Model servers & inference runtimes, Distributed systems & networking to downstream capabilities including Large language models.
examples: combined with Model servers & inference runtimes
limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Model servers & inference runtimes, Distributed systems & networking.

dependencies.rationale: Tensor, pipeline, sequence & expert parallel inference turns Model servers & inference runtimes into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Tensor, pipeline, sequence & expert parallel inference turns Distributed systems & networking into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Tensor, pipeline, sequence & expert parallel inference turns Mixture-of-experts models into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Tensor, pipeline, sequence & expert parallel inference turns Checkpoint, adapter & expert composition into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
